auth.appTagline:
Share, inspect & collaborate
on your designs
auth.appSubtitle: View-only inspect mode, pixel-perfect measurements, and real-time comments — all in one place.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your team workspace
auth.createAccountSubtitle: Start inspecting and collaborating on designs with your team.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox — we've sent a reset link to {email}
auth.joinTeam:
Join your team.
Inspect designs together.

overview.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your projects today.

teams.title: Teams
teams.subtitle: Manage your organization teams
teams.noTeamsYetDesc: Create your first team to start collaborating with your organization members.

teams.addMemberSubtitle: Select an existing organization member to add to this team
teams.teamPermissionsSubtitle: Manage what members of this team can do
teams.notificationSettingsSubtitle: Configure how you receive notifications for this team
teams.deleteTeamDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the "{name}"? All team data, including member associations and permissions, will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
teams.permViewFilesDesc: Members can view all design files in team projects
teams.permEditFilesDesc: Members can make changes to design files
teams.permDeleteFilesDesc: Members can permanently delete design files
teams.permUploadFilesDesc: Members can upload new design files to projects
teams.permAddCommentsDesc: Members can add comments on design files
teams.permDeleteCommentsDesc: Members can delete comments from other members
teams.permResolveCommentsDesc: Members can mark comments as resolved
teams.permInviteMembersDesc: Members can invite new people to the team
teams.permRemoveMembersDesc: Members can remove other members from the team
teams.permChangeRolesDesc: Members can change the roles of other members
teams.notifActivityDesc: Get notified about design activity in this team
teams.notifNewUploadDesc: When a team member uploads a new design file
teams.notifFileUpdateDesc: When a design file is updated with a new version
teams.notifNewCommentDesc: When someone comments on a team design file
teams.notifCommentReplyDesc: When someone replies to your comment
teams.notifMemberDesc: Get notified about team membership changes
teams.notifMemberJoinedDesc: When a new member joins the team
teams.notifMemberLeftDesc: When a member leaves or is removed from the team
teams.notifDeliveryDesc: Choose how you want to receive notifications
teams.notifInAppDesc: Notifications appear only inside the app
teams.notifEmailImportantDesc: Get emails only for critical updates
teams.notifEmailAllDesc: Receive an email for every notification

helpSupport.title: Help & Support
helpSupport.subtitle: Get help with using Inspecto.
helpSupport.documentationDesc: Browse our docs and tutorials to get started quickly.
helpSupport.apiReferenceDesc: Explore endpoints, authentication, and integration details.
helpSupport.communityForumDesc: Ask questions and share knowledge with other users.
helpSupport.faq1Q: How do I invite team members?
helpSupport.faq1A: Go to the Members page and click 'Invite Member'. Enter their email address and they'll receive an invitation to join.
helpSupport.faq2Q: How do I upload design files?
helpSupport.faq2A: Open a project and click 'Upload File'. You can drag and drop .pen files or browse your computer.
helpSupport.faq3A: Visit the Members page to manage roles. You can set members as Admin, Member, or Viewer.
helpSupport.faq4A: Open a file and use the download button to export your design file.
helpSupport.needMoreHelpDesc: Our support team is ready to help you with any questions.
